hero.eyebrow: Company formation & business setup in Portugal
hero.title: Set up your company in Portugal,
hero.subtitle: From your tax number to opening your bank account, Audrey Marques coordinates every step with a trusted network of partners. Not a company spun up in 2 hours, real, human support from start to finish.

items.label: Certidão Permanente after the articles are signed
Only step handled from abroad; articles and bank account signed in person

positioning.title: The real challenge isn't speed. It's getting it right.
positioning.body: Many promise a company "in 2 hours." But a poorly designed structure, run from France, with no real substance, exposes you to tax reclassification. Business Portugal is neither an accounting firm nor a tax adviser: it's your single point of contact, coordinating the right specialists to build a solid, lasting setup.
points: A single, French-speaking contact based in Lisbon
A vetted partner network: accountants, bank, tax advisers
Transparency on what's included, no hidden fees
We tell you the truth, even when it's inconvenient

process.title: From idea to a working company
process.subtitle: A clear journey, handled end to end. Expect about 3 weeks for a complete file.

steps.title: Remote NIF
steps.description: We obtain your Portuguese tax number without you having to travel.

steps.title: File preparation
steps.description: Articles, capital, business purpose, partners: everything framed with you before filing.

steps.title: Company formation
steps.description: Articles signed in person, then registration and Certidão Permanente within 24-48 h.

steps.title: RCBE & compliance
steps.description: Declaration to the central register of beneficial owners, handled by our partner lawyer right after the Certidão Permanente is issued.

steps.title: Bank account
steps.description: Support opening your account with our partner Millennium.

process.deliverable: What you get: NIF, an incorporated company, Certidão Permanente, RCBE, articles of association and banking support.

network.title: One network, one point of contact
network.subtitle: Once your company is set up, Audrey connects you with the right specialists, and stays your point of contact.

items.title: Accounting
items.description: Introductions to our partner firms for your ongoing accounting.

items.title: Tax
items.description: Guidance to the right tax advisers for your situation: IFICI, personal tax, structuring.

items.title: Registered address
items.description: Business address solutions in Lisbon through our partners.

items.title: Recruitment
items.description: Introduction to a specialised firm to hire your first team members.

network.note: Business Portugal coordinates; regulated services are provided by registered partner professionals.

cta.title: Let's talk about your project.
cta.subtitle: The first conversation is free and with no commitment. We'll look together at whether Portugal is the right move, and whether we're the right fit.

footer.tagline: Company formation and business setup in Portugal. Human support, from your NIF to your bank account.
footer.contactRole: Your single point of contact, based in Lisbon
